text: Here we are at the Good Old Fashioned Bunker Pass
maybe today you'd like to ride on this beautiful ride
very old fashioned as you can see
been around since the circus days
all clowns love riding this ride
this is the most highly favoured clown ride
and if you're a clown maybe you'd like to ride this clown ride
or maybe you want to come here with your lover or girlfriend
and ride on this ride and bump each other right here
or maybe you want to pay your girlfriend back
have a little fun and bump her around
we drivers obviously don't know how to ride
so they keep bumping into each other
badly from the back to the right side
you don't mind me bumping around?
